projects.title: Inventroy Management System
projects.description: The Inventory Management System is a web-based application designed to help efficiently manage their stock levels, track product movement, and inventory updates
projects.longDescription: The Inventory Management System is a web-based application designed to help efficiently manage their stock levels, track product movement, and inventory updates. This system provides real-time insights into stock availability, reduces manual errors, and improves operational efficiency.

projects.title: Conversational Image Recognition chatbot
projects.description: Created an interactive dashboard for sales forecasting using time series analysis and machine learning. Features real-time data visualization, trend analysis, and predictive modeling with 94% accuracy.
projects.longDescription: Developed a comprehensive analytics platform that processes large volumes of sales data to predict future trends. Utilized ARIMA models, seasonal decomposition, and ensemble methods to achieve high accuracy. The dashboard provides interactive visualizations using Plotly and Dash, allowing stakeholders to explore data and gain insights.

projects.title: Text-Emotion classification
projects.description: Developed a deep learning model for medical image classification with 95% accuracy using Convolutional Neural Networks. Specialized in detecting abnormalities in X-ray images with clinical validation.
projects.longDescription: Built a robust CNN architecture for automated medical diagnosis from X-ray images. The model was trained on a large dataset of chest X-rays and can classify multiple conditions including pneumonia, COVID-19, and other lung abnormalities. Implemented data augmentation, transfer learning, and model ensemble techniques to improve accuracy.
challenges: Ensuring model reliability for medical use

projects.title: Mental health chatbot
projects.description: Implemented LSTM networks to predict stock prices with real-time data integration and interactive visualization. Achieved consistent performance across multiple market conditions with risk analysis features.
projects.longDescription: Created a comprehensive stock prediction system using LSTM neural networks and technical indicators. The system fetches real-time stock data, processes it through multiple layers of analysis, and provides predictions with confidence intervals. Includes risk assessment, portfolio optimization suggestions, and backtesting capabilities.

projects.title: Facial Recognition System
projects.description: Built a collaborative filtering system for music recommendations using matrix factorization techniques. Integrated with Spotify API for real-time playlist generation and user preference learning.
projects.longDescription: Developed an advanced recommendation system that combines collaborative filtering, content-based filtering, and deep learning approaches. The system analyzes user listening history, song features, and social connections to provide personalized recommendations. Integrated with Spotify Web API for seamless user experience.
challenges: Cold start problem for new users

projects.title: Climate Data Analysis Platform
projects.description: Analyzed global climate patterns and trends using big data processing and advanced statistical methods. Created interactive visualizations for climate change research with geospatial analysis.
projects.longDescription: Built a comprehensive platform for climate data analysis using large-scale datasets from NASA and NOAA. Implemented distributed computing with Apache Spark for processing terabytes of climate data. Created interactive dashboards showing temperature trends, precipitation patterns, and extreme weather events with geospatial visualization.
challenges: Creating meaningful visualizations for complex patterns

projects.title: Sentiment Analysis Web App
projects.description: Created a real-time sentiment analysis application for social media monitoring. Uses transformer models for accurate emotion detection with multilingual support and trend analysis.
projects.longDescription: Developed a web application that performs real-time sentiment analysis on social media posts and customer reviews. Implemented transformer-based models (BERT, RoBERTa) for high accuracy sentiment classification. Features include emotion detection, trend analysis, and automated reporting for business intelligence.
challenges: Handling sarcasm and context in text

projects.title: Computer Vision Object Detector
projects.description: Built a real-time object detection system using YOLO architecture for autonomous vehicle applications. Achieved 92% mAP on COCO dataset with optimized inference speed.
projects.longDescription: Developed a state-of-the-art object detection system optimized for real-time applications. Used YOLOv5 architecture with custom training on automotive datasets. Implemented model optimization techniques including quantization and TensorRT acceleration for deployment on edge devices.
challenges: Handling various lighting and weather conditions
